backend/main.mo: Main actor defining ContentSection, PrintableGuide, and Technician types with query/mutation functions for managing pest control educational content, guides, and technician directory by zip code, including blob storage mixin and migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms OldTechnician records (without zipCode/state fields) to NewTechnician records by adding default zipCode=0 and state="Unknown" values while preserving other actor state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that TechnicianFinder.tsx implements display of city and state alongside zip code for technician search results with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend component files describing the app's structure including pest education tabs, photo scanner, technician finder, printable guides, and navigation system.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color palette for light/dark modes, defining CSS custom properties for UI theming including background, foreground, primary, secondary, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag and root div that loads the React app via main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with QueryClient provider, ErrorBoundary wrapper, and conditional routing between QR code page and main educational content with header, footer, and bottom navigation icon.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Fixed bottom-right floating navigation button with maximum z-index (9999) and large touch target that navigates to the next logical route using useNextRoute hook.
frontend/src/components/EducationalConte: Main content component with hash-based tab navigation (scanner, identify, habitats, prevention, treatment, guides, findLocalHelp) and pest selection UI for 18 different pests, rendering appropriate educational sections based on selected pest and active tab.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary class component that catches render errors and displays a user-friendly fallback UI with error details and a reset button to return to main app.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright notice, caffeine.ai attribution with heart icon, and disclaimer text about consulting professional pest control services.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header component displaying the Pest ID & Guide branding with a bug icon and a share button that opens a QR code dialog.
frontend/src/components/pests/ArmyAntsCo: Informational content component about army ants covering identification, physical characteristics, species distribution, habitats, raiding behavior, and safety warnings. Includes structured cards with icons and detailed bullet lists.
frontend/src/components/pests/BeetlesCon: Informational content component about household beetles covering identification, common species (carpet beetles, flour beetles, etc.), infestation signs, entry points, and attractants. Uses card-based layout with icons.
frontend/src/components/pests/BlackAntsC: Informational content component about black ants covering identification, common species (little black ant, pavement ant), nesting locations, and attractants. Includes safety notice and structured cards with detailed characteristics.
frontend/src/components/pests/BlackStink: React component displaying educational content about black stink bugs, including identification characteristics, entry behavior, hiding spots, and prevention/control methods. Uses shadcn/ui Card and Alert components with lucide-react icons.
frontend/src/components/pests/CarpenterA: React component providing detailed information about carpenter ants with structural damage warnings, identification guides, habitat information, and control methods. Includes destructive alerts for safety notices and uses shadcn/ui components.
frontend/src/components/pests/Cockroache: React component offering comprehensive cockroach identification, infestation signs, habitat information, and control strategies. Features safety alerts and uses Card/Alert components from shadcn/ui.
frontend/src/components/pests/CommonHous: React component describing common house flies, their physical characteristics, life cycle, attractants, and prevention methods. Emphasizes disease transmission risks and sanitation practices using shadcn/ui components.
frontend/src/components/pests/EarwigsCon: React component presenting earwig identification, behavior patterns, habitats, and control measures. Notes they are generally harmless nuisance pests and uses shadcn/ui Card/Alert components.
frontend/src/components/pests/HeadLiceCo: React component displaying comprehensive information about head lice including identification, signs, checking methods, transmission, and prevention. Uses shadcn/ui Card and Alert components with Lucide icons.
frontend/src/components/pests/LargeFlies: React component providing detailed information about large fly species (blow flies, flesh flies, cluster flies, horse/deer flies) including identification, signs of infestation, and characteristics. Uses shadcn/ui Card and Alert components.
frontend/src/components/pests/MiceConten: React component covering mouse identification, signs of infestation, physical characteristics, nesting materials, habitats, and entry points. Includes health and safety warnings using shadcn/ui components.
frontend/src/components/pests/MothsLarva: React component detailing moth and larvae identification, including clothes moths and pantry moths, their signs, locations, and attractants. Uses shadcn/ui Card and Alert components with Lucide icons.
frontend/src/components/pests/RedAntsCon: React component providing information about red ant species (fire ants, harvester ants, pharaoh ants) with safety warnings about stings, identification details, habitats, and nesting locations. Uses shadcn/ui components with destructive alert variant.
frontend/src/components/pests/ScorpionsC: Displays educational content about scorpions including identification, physical characteristics, common species, habitats, behavior patterns, and safety warnings about stings.
frontend/src/components/pests/SpidersCon: Provides comprehensive information about spiders including identification, common indoor species, signs of presence, and detailed warnings about venomous species like black widows.
frontend/src/components/pests/TicksConte: Educational component covering tick identification, life cycle, feeding behavior, activity patterns, common exposure locations, and health warnings about tick-borne diseases.
frontend/src/components/pests/WoodBeetle: Presents information about wood-boring beetles including species identification, signs of infestation, damage characteristics, common locations, and structural damage warnings.
frontend/src/components/PhotoScanner.tsx: Main photo scanning component that handles camera capture, file upload, image editing (rotation, zoom, crop, enhance), and saving/managing scanned pest photos with tags and persistence.
Displays downloadable PDF guides filtered by content type, with cards showing guide titles, descriptions, and download buttons.
frontend/src/components/QrCodePage.tsx: Full-page QR code sharing interface that generates a QR code for the app URL and provides copy-link and download-QR functionality with error handling.
frontend/src/components/SavedScansGaller: Gallery view of saved pest scans with filtering by tags, reordering, deletion with confirmation dialog, and displays scan thumbnails with metadata and tag management.
frontend/src/components/SavedScanTagsEdi: Tag management component for saved scans, allowing users to add, edit, and remove tags with inline editing and keyboard shortcuts.
frontend/src/components/sections/Habitat: Displays bed bug habitat information including common hiding spots, feeding behavior, reproduction lifecycle, and detection tips with accompanying images.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeatTre: Alert dialog component that displays critical safety warnings before heat treatment, including ammunition removal, furniture handling, and occupancy restrictions with confirm/cancel actions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Identif: React component displaying educational content about bed bug identification, including cards for adult bed bugs, life stages, bite marks, and signs of infestation with images and descriptive text.
frontend/src/components/sections/Prevent: React component providing prevention strategies for bed bugs, covering travel precautions, used furniture inspection, and home protection measures with images and detailed instructions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Treatme: React component with an interactive heat treatment checklist organized into before/during/after phases, featuring progress tracking, reminder dialogs, and completion statistics using custom hooks.
frontend/src/components/ShareQrCodeDialo: Dialog component for sharing the app via QR code or link, with copy-to-clipboard and download functionality. Includes error handling, loading states, and a link to open a full-page QR view.
frontend/src/components/TechnicianFinder: Component for searching pest control technicians by zip code using a query hook. Validates 5-digit zip codes, displays search results with formatted location details, and handles loading/error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook managing Internet Identity authentication and actor creation for backend communication, with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useHashRoute.ts: Custom React hook implementing hash-based routing with hash normalization, navigation helpers, and route matching without external router dependencies.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeatTreatmentCheck: Custom React hook managing heat treatment checklist item completion state with localStorage persistence, providing toggle, reset, and completion statistics functionality.
Custom React hook managing the first-visit reminder dialog state for the heat treatment checklist with localStorage persistence for confirmation status.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageEditor.ts: Custom React hook providing image editing capabilities including rotation, zoom, enhancement, and export functionality with async processing and state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useNextRoute.ts: Custom hook that determines the next logical navigation destination in a predefined educational tab flow (scanner → identify → habitats → prevention → treatment → guides → findLocalHelp).
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching printable guides (by content type, all, or by ID) and technicians by zip code from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSavedScans.ts: Manages saved pest scans in localStorage with CRUD operations, tag management, reordering, and graceful fallback when storage is unavailable.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm educational color palette for both light and dark modes, plus utility classes for checklist items and bottom navigation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/assert.ts: Type-safe assertion utilities including invariant checks, exhaustive switch helpers, and null/undefined guards for runtime safety.
frontend/src/utils/clipboard.ts: Safe clipboard copy utility with modern API and fallback support, returning structured success/failure results for user feedback.
frontend/src/utils/imageProcessing.ts: Canvas-based image manipulation utilities for rotating, enhancing (contrast/brightness), zooming, and cropping images with promise-based APIs.
frontend/src/utils/qr.ts: QR code generation and download utilities using an external API service, with error handling and user-facing error messages.
frontend/src/utils/safeStorage.ts: Provides a safe wrapper around localStorage with error handling for quota/disabled scenarios, exposing functions to get, set, remove items and check storage availability.
frontend/src/utils/shareUrl.ts: Utility functions to compute shareable app URLs, returning either the origin only or the full URL including hash.
frontend/src/utils/useOnUnmount.ts: React hook that safely executes cleanup logic on component unmount, handling both sync and async callbacks.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH, container settings, border radius variables, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for "Pest Control Finder" with pending feature requests to add city/state fields to technician data and display them in the search interface.
